chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1043 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «صَاحِبُ اَلْبَطَنِ اَلْغَالِبِ يَتَوَضَّأُ وَ يَبْنِي عَلَى صَلاَتِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1043 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that He said:
"The person who has a frequent (or overpowering) stomach condition should perform ablution (wudu) and continue with their prayer (salat)."
